# openai_groups (Data Source)

List organization groups.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_groups" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) Groups returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `group_type` (String) group type
- `id` (String) id
- `is_scim_managed` (Boolean) is scim managed
- `name` (String) name
